title: HTTPS requests fail with METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED error
symptom: When using the HTTP Request Node with HTTPS URLs, the request fails with a 'METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED' error, while HTTP URLs work fine.
applies_when: HTTPS URL is being accessed through a proxy
not_this_if: Using a version of n8n later than 1.94
root_cause: Prior to version 1.94, n8n had issues handling HTTPS requests when configured to use a proxy. This could lead to improper request handling, resulting in errors like METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED.
fix_steps: Upgrade n8n to a version later than 1.94
Test the HTTPS request again in the HTTP Request Node
agent_instruction: Upgrade n8n to a version post 1.94 to resolve HTTPS request issues.
